name: agent-smith
description: Autonomous development pipeline — auto-configures MCP servers, scaffolds project-aware Claude Code skills, and drives ticket-to-PR workflows

interface.shortDescription: One command to set up your entire AI-powered development pipeline
interface.longDescription: Agent Smith bootstraps your Claude Code project in seconds. It detects your tech stack (38 frameworks, 12 languages), installs and configures 11 MCP servers, generates 12+ project-specific skills, and sets up autonomous ticket-to-PR workflows. Includes interactive project interviews, caveman compression, health checks, and cross-platform support for macOS, Linux, and Windows.
defaultPrompt: Analyze my project and detect the tech stack
Show me insights and improvement suggestions
